channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: TitaniumTools
item.description: Adds titanium tools (pickaxe, axe, shovel, etc.)

item.title: Oils! Resoaped Standalone
item.description: A content mod that adds plant oils & some alternative recipes, e.g. treating hides and quicklime.

item.title: Oils! Resoaped
item.description: A content mod that adds plant oils & some alternative recipes, e.g. treating hides and quicklime.

item.title: Wild West Surface
item.description: Addon for Wild West Climate that adds sandstone-style western desert geology

item.title: More Tools
item.description: Adds stainless steel and titanium variants for vanilla tools to Vintage Story

item.title: Trader Phone (Beta)
item.description: Let's make a call to traders and check their stocks!

item.title: Scoop of Jam
item.description: Scoop jam with a spoon to make jam sandwiches and jam pies!

item.title: Self-Recording Thermometer
item.description: Adds a self-recording thermometer

item.title: Thatch is Grass!
item.description: A simple mod that lets you convert thatch into dried grass and back.

item.title: Wild West Climate
item.description: Makes the west drier, hotter, and more desert-like as you travel across the world.

item.title: StirlingMotor
item.description: Adds a Stirling engine (coal energy)

item.title: Launcher Mod Updater
item.description: An in-game mod updater that allows to download new updates for active mods.

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: Mobility
item.description: Step Up / Climb / Grab / Auto Walk / Auto Run

item.title: Leaf Litter
item.description: Adds dynamic leaf litter that can be raked, composted, and used as mulch.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Seasonal Flowers
item.description: Flowers now sprout, bloom, die back, and go dormant. (The mod that hides flowers in the winter)

item.title: Everything Black Raspberries
item.description: Adds black raspberry bushes and their respective products. Now with Expanded Foods compatibility!

item.title: Fast Packed Dirt Paths
item.description: Increases player speed when walking on packed dirt

item.title: VSSB - Vintage Story Server Buddy
item.description: Small app for managing mods and configs on remote container servers via SSH with SFTP\CAT methods.

item.title: Chonky Kitchenware
item.description: This mod aims to make your kitchen feel more cozy, giving it a personal touch!

item.title: Chonky Vessels
item.description: Adds chonkier vessels & more with better storage and spoilage properties.

item.title: Firearms Resound
item.description: Replaces and adds new sounds to Firearms, including Extra Firearms

item.title: Vanilla Fantasy Overhaul - Lore Mobs
item.description: A remodling of the Lore Mobs to make them fantastical. Not Finished.

item.title: Adventurer's Walking Stick
item.description: Adds various walking sticks that provide benefits to walking speed and hunger rate

item.title: World Pregenerator
item.description: A server‑side mod that pre‑generates the world in small sectors using a square spiral from the cente

item.title: ChunkMap Pregenerator
item.description: Generates colored PNG land/sea maps with configurable scale.

item.title: IOG - Vanilla Cave-In Restore
item.description: IOG - Vanilla Cave-In Restore. A small compatibility / restore mod for Interesting Ore Gen.

item.title: BR Extension Pack
item.description: Runtime enhancement addon for BetterRuins with configurable schematic durability and future gameplay
